meaning: n.内地,(指澳大利亚等偏僻而人口稀少的地方)adj.内地的adv.在内地
examples: She went solo backpacking for eight months in the Australian outback.
Are there many people living in the outback?
In one television commercial, the hurdler chases a kangaroo across the Australian outback.
"He was going to sell every Outback on his lot without a problem, " Gardella laments.
The model even gloms onto those with seeming weaknesses--like Outback, where earnings dipped 5% last year.
